title: Way Too Many Locks
description: A minecraft mod that adds a ton of fun and unique locks, with a bit of a story to them!
body:
**This is an Mcreator mod!**

### **THANK YOU FOR EVERYTHING**
My C Disk had to get wiped due to it getting corrupted, so basically most of my Mcreator projects are gone, including Way Too Many Locks. It's been a fun ride with all of you! I'm sad that I wont be able to release the Omega Lock, but sometimes, bad luck happens.

This mod is about a ton of random, fun, and unique locks you can play with, each having its advancement, giving you a goal of getting every lock. I originally made a lock mod for 1.16.5, called Too Many Locks, but i never finished it, until now, where I came back and remade the entire thing, adding tons more locks!

How to use the ancient mechanisms:

Lock Creation Plate:
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>
Make a 3x3 plate out of the 9 blocks, and build the structure needed for the custom lock ontop.
</details>
Lock Infuser:
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>
Place a Basic Lock on top of the Infuser, then right click the infuser using the item needed for the custom lock.
</details>
Lockio Crafter:
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>
Place any lock ontop, and right click the crafter.
</details>
Lock Researcher:
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>
Place any lock ontop, and right click the researcher. Sometimes, some unique blocks can quadruple
what made them.
</details>
Lock Imploder:
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>
Replace the middle of a Lock Creation Plate with the Imploder.
</details>
Locksmither:
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>
Right click the Locksmither with a tool.
</details>
Multiversal Lock Reassembler:
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>
 Place any lock ontop, and right click the MLR.
</details>
Lock Patterner
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>
Place any lock ontop, and right click the Patterner while holding a Pattern
</details>
Lock Furnace
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>
Place any lock ontop, and right click the Lock Furnace. You can also do this with items by holding the item in your hand.
</details>

This mod is still currently in development and I will add a ton more locks eventually!
If you have any suggestions or find any bugs, feel free to comment.
